en.extract:
Tuamotu kingfisher has been split into the following species:

Niau kingfisher, 	Todiramphus gertrudae
Mangareva kingfisher,  Todiramphus gambieri
en.wikitext:
'''Tuamotu kingfisher''' has been split into the following species:

* [[Niau kingfisher]], 	''Todiramphus gertrudae''
* [[Mangareva kingfisher]],  ''Todiramphus gambieri''
